changes.value:
## What

Delete `backendDispatch` and `dispatchCommand` from `command-scope.tsx`. Every command dispatch in the codebase MUST go through `useDispatchCommand` which reads scope from React context. No exceptions. No `invoke("dispatch_command", ...)` either — that's the same bypass with a different name.

### Why

`backendDispatch` bypasses the React scope chain. Every time an agent uses it, it manually constructs a scope chain that misses intermediate scopes (mode, board, store, etc.). `useDispatchCommand` builds the correct scope chain automatically from React context. The deprecated functions are a trap that agents keep falling into.

### Files to modify

**Delete from `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/command-scope.tsx`:**
- Delete `backendDispatch` function (lines ~242-246)
- Delete `dispatchCommand` function (lines ~258-278)
- Delete `useExecuteCommand` function (lines ~281-308) — also deprecated
- In `useDispatchCommand` (line ~337): replace `backendDispatch({...})` with `invoke("dispatch_command", {...})` — this is the ONE place that calls the backend, inside the hook

**Migrate callers to `useDispatchCommand`:**
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/board-view.tsx` — 3 calls (`column.reorder`, `task.move`, `task.add`). Use `useDispatchCommand` at component top level, call returned function in callbacks.
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/entity-card.tsx` — ALREADY FIXED by user. Uses `useDispatchCommand("ui.inspect")`.
- Any other file importing `backendDispatch` or `dispatchCommand`

**Update test files:**
- `command-scope.test.tsx` — remove `backendDispatch` test block
- `entity-card.test.tsx` — update if needed
- Other test files that mock `backendDispatch` — update mocks

### CRITICAL RULE

The ONLY place `invoke("dispatch_command", ...)` should appear is inside `useDispatchCommand` in `command-scope.tsx`. Nowhere else. If you need to dispatch a command, use `useDispatchCommand`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `backendDispatch` does not exist anywhere in the codebase
- [ ] `dispatchCommand` does not exist anywhere (except test comments)
- [ ] `invoke("dispatch_command", ...)` appears ONLY inside `useDispatchCommand` in command-scope.tsx
- [ ] All command dispatches go through `useDispatchCommand`
- [ ] board-view.tsx uses `useDispatchCommand` for column.reorder, task.move, task.add

## Tests
- [ ] `cd kanban-app/ui && pnpm vitest run` — all pass
- [ ] `grep -r backendDispatch kanban-app/ui/src --include='*.tsx' --include='*.ts' | grep -v test | grep -v '.d.ts'` returns nothing
Delete backendDispatch and dispatchCommand — all dispatch must use useDispatchCommand
